title: Kielbasa Casserole
description: A hearty, comforting casserole filled with spicy kielbasa, chewy pasta, and a blend of cheeses.
instructions: Cook pasta according to package instructions; set aside.
In a large skillet, cook kielbasa over medium-high heat until browned, about 5 minutes.
Add chopped onion and minced garlic to the skillet; cook until onion is translucent.
In a large mixing bowl, combine cooked pasta, kielbasa mixture, and shredded cheese.
Transfer the mixture to a 9x13 inch baking dish.
Bake in preheated oven for 25-30 minutes, or until cheese is melted and bubbly.
Remove from oven and let cool for a few minutes before serving.
